text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooosh...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I have finally arrived upon the doorstep of ruin, O
Destiny.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
As the fated moment approaches, my right hand
trembles with the influence of dark forces beyond
human ken...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After completing the Arima Kinen, we return to
the academy with the fourth clue.
choice_data_list: Do you know where to go?
Do you know where to go?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But of course... If the divine truly exists in this
world, there is no place more fitting.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
There can be no doubt in my mind, for it's the
place where I myself truly belong.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Are you ready? Then let us be off...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...to the land of our demise.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...This is it.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Where the freshest seafood gets put on display!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Behold, the mock marine playground, known to
the masses as the aquarium!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the Arima Kinen, we received clues that
said "UM," "QUA," and "RI."
choice_data_list: And for the final clue, we received "A"!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You got it! All you need to do is shuffle these
papers around, and you get the word
"AQUARIUM"!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Talk about the answer being right under my
nose... To think that the entrance to Eden was
here all along!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Now then, where oh where is it hiding?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: This way?! That way?! Or could it be over there?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff... The heck is going on?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I've combed this place top to bottom, but all I
see are displays of pre-unprepared seafood!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I can't even find a whiff of Eden's front door!
Somebody's got some explaining to do!
Ha ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What? That voice!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Bravo! You've done well to follow the Eden
Protocol and successfully reach this point!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Most impressive! And you did wonderfully as well,
Trainer! Your support during the whole process
was exemplary!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The Don?! What is the head of Tracen Academy
doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
H-hang on. Trainer, did you have any idea about
this?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've long suspected the unique voice we heard at
the races was Director Akikawa's, and now I
finally have confirmation of it.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You knew all this time and you never said
anything to me?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Wait... Then what the heck even is Eden?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Listen well! I shall make it all clear as day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa explains the origins of this
entire scheme.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She had taken note of Gold Ship's wild yet
powerful passion, and hoped to focus it on the
Twinkle Series by making the experience more
exciting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus she created the Eden Protocol, a plan to
keep Gold Ship motivated using chapters and
clues from a mysterious "Book of Secrets."

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
In conclusion! The true Eden you sought was the
utopia forged by Umamusume in the Twinkle
Series itself!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, you have already arrived!
Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, c'mon! Talk about anticlimactic!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Buuut... I've got to admit you put on a good show.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The Book of Secrets and clues, I get. But how the
heck did you infiltrate my dreams?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Your dreams? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
C'mon. It was you who spoke to me in my dreams,
right?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You know, the whole, "Ship of gold, resting
beneath the waves..."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
"Uncharted territory lies just before you... Now is
the time to unleash your true potential..." Stuff
like that.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So how'd you do it? Was it cutting-edge
technology? Or some mind-bendy telekinesis?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Ngggh?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
N-nonsense! That phenomenon is beyond my
knowledge!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Believe me! I have no involvement whatsoever in
those dreams!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...For realsies?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Dang, this is like one of those fantasy stories
where a divine being awakens in someone!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Or maybe it's more like those thrillers where the
main character discovers they have a second
hidden personality!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus concludes Gold Ship's Twinkle Series,
though the situation is still completely shrouded
in mystery!
"Ship of gold, resting beneath the waves..."

"Welcome to these pristine lands, yet unmarred
by any other..."

"However, your journey does not end here... Set
your sights on the brilliant future..."

"Go forth upon the golden path, which shall lead
you far, far to the distant horizon..."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship: The Ultimate Unsinkable Battleship
(End)
